overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a drive along an elevated highway during sunset. The journey begins overlooking Night City's futuristic skyline with megabuildings and neon billboards, continues past an industrial refinery complex, transitions through rocky desert terrain, and ends approaching a tunnel carved into red rock cliffs.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway overlooking futuristic city center

agents.ego_description: driving steadily along elevated highway with view of Night City skyline

entered.detail: tall futuristic skyscraper with illuminated '07' signage on facade
adjacent skyscraper with '06' signage visible to the left
large illuminated advertisement screen displaying purple and pink graphics
metal safety barrier running along the right edge of the road
scattered palm trees lining the left side of the highway

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on an elevated highway during golden hour, with the camera moving forward toward Night City's iconic skyline. Megabuildings 06 and 07 dominate the view, backlit by the setting sun, while digital billboards and palm trees line the route.

events.description: large industrial refinery building with smokestacks comes into view on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing along highway, navigating gentle curve while passing industrial structures

notable_agents.action: car driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining distance

entered.detail: massive industrial structure with multiple smokestacks and scaffolding
utility poles with suspended cables running parallel to the highway

segments.scene_description: The highway curves past a massive industrial refinery complex on the right, with megabuilding 07 now visible to the left. Power lines run parallel to the road as the camera follows a vehicle ahead, maintaining steady highway speed.

scene_state.functional_zone: scenic overlook with entertainment dome and city views

events.description: camera pans left to capture panoramic view of city skyline while continuing forward
landscape transitions from urban cityscape to rocky desert terrain with red cliffs

agents.ego_description: driving while panning to admire the cityscape, then proceeding toward desert terrain

entered.detail: large illuminated dome structure with spokes of light, likely a stadium or arena
steep reddish-brown rocky cliffs beginning to appear on the left side

segments.scene_description: The camera pans to showcase a panoramic view of the city's entertainment district, featuring a large illuminated dome structure. As the drive continues, the urban landscape gradually gives way to red rock formations on the left, marking the transition to the desert outskirts.

events.description: approaching tunnel entrance carved into the red rock face ahead

agents.ego_description: descending along highway toward tunnel entrance, following traffic ahead

notable_agents.action: vehicle ahead with brake lights on, slowing for tunnel approach

entered.detail: dark tunnel mouth carved into the red rock cliff face ahead
solid concrete bridge or overpass structure on the right side of road

segments.scene_description: The final segment descends through a desert canyon with towering red rock walls on the left. The city skyline fades into the distance as the camera approaches a tunnel entrance carved into the rock face, passing under a concrete overpass structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along an elevated highway that transitions from the futuristic urban sprawl of Night City into a rugged desert canyon. It begins by gliding toward a skyline of backlit megabuildings and digital billboards under the warm glow of the golden hour. As the highway curves, the view shifts from the city center to a massive industrial refinery complex and parallel power lines before panning across the illuminated dome of the entertainment district. The urban landscape then gradually gives way to red rock formations on the left, marking a shift in terrain as the city skyline fades into the distance. Finally, the camera descends through a canyon of towering red walls, passing under a concrete overpass as it approaches a tunnel carved directly into the rock face.
